title: An Act authorizing the city of Beverly to continue the employment of John G. LeLacheur as police chief

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Bowen of Beverly and Senator Lovely, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5248) of Hannah Bowen (with the approval of the mayor and city council) that the city of Beverly be authorized to continue the employment of John G. LeLacheur as police chief in said city.  Public Service.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Public Service
Hearing scheduled for 04/14/2026 from 02:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-2
Hearing scheduled for 04/14/2026 from 02:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-2

Hearing rescheduled to 04/14/2026 from 02:00 PM-02:20 PM in A-2                                                                                                                                                                                     and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
